items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 westbound between Exit 346B: UNIVERSITY AVE and Exit 345: 30TH STREET/MARKET STREET. All lanes closed.
items.formatted: I-76 (Philadelphia County) | Multi-vehicle crash on I-76 westbound between Exit 346B: UNIVERSITY AVE and Exit 345: 30TH STREET/MARKET STREET. All lanes Closed. Estimated Reopen: 3/2/26 - 23:45
